{{CargoRelic
|name=Gaea Totem
|class_id=20295
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This totem obtained from the Wonder Sage emits a strong and familiar aura. It is said to have the power to help the holder break through the limits of Godhood. However, when carefully staring at it, one always feels a sense of inexplicable unease...
|fame=17
|art=14
|fth=31
|civ=15
|tech=13
|ss1=All Sanctum Glorium Output +0.4%
|ss2=All Sanctum Glorium Output +0.8%
|ss3=All Sanctum Glorium Output +1.2%
|ss4=All Sanctum Glorium Output +1.2%
|ss7=All Sanctum Glorium Output +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
